copyAspDesc:
To use the web service on the asp.net platform, follow these steps:

  1. In the Solution Explorer, right click on the project name, right-click "Add" (to expand the options), and select "Service Reference".
    Alternatively, you can select the top menu in "Website" and then select "Add Service Reference".
  2. Click the "Advanced" button at the bottom of the window.
  3. In the new window that opens, click the "Add Web Reference ..." button at the bottom of the window.
  4. Type in the field "URL" link to the API of Pulseem "Http://www.pulseem.co.il/Pulseem/PulseemServices.asmx" and click on the arrow marking.
  5. The interface will then be interfaced with Pulseem. In the "Web reference name:" field, enter the name "GlobalPulseemService" (in order for the code example we provided to work) and click the "Add Reference" button.
  6. After pressing "Add Reference" you will be given the GlobalPulseemService under the App_WebReference folder.
  7. Then open a new page (in our example we called it Default.aspx) and add a button (in our example we called it btnAction) and in its event OnClick add the method as provided.
** You can change the name of the page, the name of the button and the event that triggers the method as long as you maintain the legality of working with asp.net.
copyHTMLDesc:
Copy the code, fill out the parameters, and click the Submit button.
** In the case of array parameters,inputs with the same name can be added. Note that the number of objects in the array need to be equal to the number of elements in all the array parameters in the method.
copyJavaDesc:
To use the web service on the eclipse platform, follow these steps:
  1. Download the HttpComponents directory from https://hc.apache.org/downloads.cgi and add the .jar files to the project.
  2. Then create a new class called PulseemApi (so that the code example we provided will work). Note that the public static void main (String [] args) option is selected and click the Finish button.
  3. Copy the code provided and complete the parameters, then run the project.
copyJqueryDesc:
Copy the code, paste it into script tags, and fill in the parameters.
** Attach a link to the Jquery directory in addition to the code.
** If the parameters are array type - you can add additions of inputs with the same name, Note that the number of organs in an array need to be equal to the number of elements in all parameters of the array type in the method.
copyPhpdesc:
Copy the code from above and fill in the parameter values
*** Note that only string parameters are written in quotation marks. Int / byte / boolean parameters will be written without quotation marks.

restricted.preText:
Attention!!!

We have identified that the domain defined for sending the newsletter is not a verified domain.

The 'From Email' field found on the 'campaign settings' page contains a free domain of the type Gmail / Hotmail / Yahoo / Walla, etc.
To remind you, the new mandatory requirements of Gmail require a verified domain for mailing newsletters.


If the necessary adjustments are not made, it will not be possible to send the newsletter.

To make a change in the settings of the domain from which the campaign is sent,
enter the 'Campaign Settings' page by clicking on the button below
On the 'Campaign Settings' page, you can re-enter the verified domain name under field: 'From Email'.
If the domain you enter is not verified, you must follow the detailed instructions.

nonVerified.preText:

Then, you can re-enter the verified domain name under the 'From Email' field.

verifyDomain.title: Existing domain verification
verifyDomain.text:
Do you have your own domain? perfect. The best recommendation is to use it.
Now, you must perform a verification process for your domain - go to the guide,
Emplement the detailed SPF and DKIM records, plus publish your DMARC policy.
After you have finished, perform a validation check according to the instructions posted near the end of the guide.

buyVerifiedDomain.title: Purchase of a business domain
buyVerifiedDomain.text:
If you do not have your own business domain, our recommendation is to purchase such a domain. You have 2 alternatives:
  • You can purchase a domain independently and then verify the domain you purchased according to the instructions detailed at the bottom of the guide.
  • Use the Pulseem sales team to purchase a business domain and verify it according to the requirements.
    Contact the support team by phone: 03-5240290 or send an email: sales@pulseem.com

sendFromSharedDomain.title: Sending via Shared Domain
sendFromSharedDomain.text:
In case you have chosen not to verify your domain, we allow you to send via a Shared Domain of Pulseem.
To understand the meaning and consequences of using a shared domain, go to the Shared Domain Guide.

If however You chose this option, you must follow 2 instructions:
  • First, you must choose your username. The domain will be permanent and will end in: pulseem.co.
  • After that, enter the email address you want your customers to return to if necessary in the field: 'Reply To Email'.
sendFromSharedDomain.text1: Pay attention! Replies to the email will be sent to the first email address verified for sending
sendFromSharedDomain.button: Set as From Email address and proceed to edit the campaign
sendFromSharedDomain.saveDomain: Save and set as From Email address
sendFromSharedDomain.saveAndContinue: Save and continue to Campaign Editor

gmailVerificationDescription:
This column shows the corresponding status of the selected domain with GMAIL servers.
The test process takes several minutes. You can click the refresh button to get an updated status according to the following details:

 Unverified domain - please contact Pulseem's support department by phone: 03-5240290 or by email at: support@pulseem.com.
- Domain successfully verified
domainVerificationDashboardPopupText:
Dear customers,



Are you prepared for the mandatory requirements that Gmail has announced regarding the verification of the EMAIL addresses from which your campaigns originate?

As of 1/29/24, we are aligning with Gmail's strict requirements and will not allow sending newsletters from UnVerified domains.

To perform a test that examines whether the domains you have are verified, click on the button below.
For complete information detailing the reasons for the changes, the reasons for the required adjustments, the execution of the verification process, etc., click on 'More information'.
dynamicProductNotice:
Since you added a dynamic product block it is important to verify:
1. Not to drag the objects of the product block outside of its original block.
2. Not to edit the dynamic text of the block. For example: #name#.

You are unable to send an email with more than one dynamic product block.
In order to proceed please delete all the dynamic product blocks but one.
noMoreThanOneDynamicBlockSave:
You are unable to save the email with more than one dynamic product block.
In order to proceed please delete all the dynamic product blocks but one.
noMoreThanOneDynamicBlockExit:

In order to proceed please delete all the dynamic product blocks but one.
